name: Khaos Starsource Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>空</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>隙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>原</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
1 LIGHT or DARK Dragon monster + 1 Dragon monster
If this card is Fusion Summoned: You can target cards your opponent controls, up to the number of your LIGHT and DARK monsters used as this card's material; destroy them. If this card is banished: You can target 1 Level 4 LIGHT or DARK Dragon monster you control; its Level becomes 8. You can only use each effect of "Khaos Starsource Dragon" once per turn.
